---
title: "Portfolio"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    title-block: false
---

<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

main.content {
  padding-top: 0.35rem;
}
</style>

<div class="homepage-layout">
<div class="main-stack">
<div class="hero-copy">
<div class="hero-topline">
<div class="hero-identity">
<img src="assets/profile.jpeg" alt="Portrait of Jaeseok Hwang" class="hero-portrait">
<h2 class="hero-heading">Jaeseok Hwang</h2>
</div>
<div class="hero-summary">
<p class="hero-kicker">Research, code, and decision analytics</p>
<ul class="hero-points">
<li>Ph.D. (Aug 2026) in Applied Economics, UIUC.</li>
<li>This page brings together my dissertation chapters and individual research portfolio, with a focus on producer risk management under price and environmental shocks. Methodologically, I work with supervised machine learning, including XGBoost and Random Forest, together with causal inference and spatial analytics.</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://github.com/jaeseokh" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jaeseok-hwang-0b06741a1" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="surface project-panel">
<h2>Project(Papers)</h2>

<div class="project-stack">
<div class="chapter-card project-entry">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 1</p>
<h3>Transferability of Multi-Field Information</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Keywords: transferability, spatial heterogeneity, holdout validation</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="research/chapter1.html">Open summary</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/value_multifield_python" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="chapter-card project-entry">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 2</p>
<h3>Information Validity and Profitability Risk</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Keywords: profitability risk, exogenous shocks, Bayesian hierarchy</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="research/chapter2.html">Open summary</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/corn_seed_response" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="chapter-card project-entry">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 3</p>
<h3>Value of Information in Stochastic Environments</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Keywords: value of information, stochastic environments, causal inference</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="research/chapter3.html">Open summary</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/value_multifield_ofpe" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<aside class="project-side">
<p class="eyebrow">New research</p>
<h3>Decision, Risk and AI</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Keywords: U.S. macro desk, public API pipeline, lagged scenario scoring</p>
<p>This project turns public macro and market data into a daily static scenario monitor for U.S. macro risk. The current build tracks energy and geopolitical shocks, measures transmission into rates, credit, FX, and equities, and publishes a recruiter-facing desk note every day.</p>
<p class="project-side-note">The public page now functions as a live research surface rather than a placeholder. It shows the active event lens, scenario probabilities, lag confirmation table, and the daily market dashboard.</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="research/working_papers.html">Open daily desk</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/jaeseokh.github.io" target="_blank">Website repo</a>
</div>
<div class="project-side-spacer"></div>
</aside>
</div>
